name: LG Golf Instruction & Training
about: LG Golf Instruction & Training is a golf instruction facility located at Fairchild Wheeler Golf Course in Fairfield, CT, operated by LPGA Teaching Professional Liz Gentile. The facility provides comprehensive golf training experiences through individual, semi-private, and group lessons, utilizing both outdoor practice areas and an indoor teaching studio equipped with video analysis and launch monitor technology. Instruction covers all aspects of the game, including full swing, short game, on-course playing lessons, and specialized programs for beginners through advanced players.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium technology with Foresight Sports GCQuad launch monitor for detailed shot analysis
Flexible lesson options including indoor/outdoor settings and on-course playing lessons
Structured programs like CORE and Fast Trac for all skill levels with clear pricing
LPGA-certified instruction with personalized focus on swing mechanics and game improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor used for indoor lessons with video analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, as a golf instruction facility, it's expected students have their own equipment. Equipment advice and recommendations are provided as part of lesson programs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding food and drink services or policies. The facility appears focused on instruction rather than dining.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Since this is a training facility rather than a simulator venue with course play, 18-hole rounds aren't applicable. Lesson durations range from 30 minutes to 1.5 hours depending on the program.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers beginner programs and specifically mentions the Fast Trac series for new golfers, which could include juniors and youth. The teaching approach appears adaptable to different age groups.
